name: qonto-matchmaker

interface.longDescription: Finds missing Qonto receipts. When the mail connector returns PDF files, Claude Code and Codex validate matches and upload them after user approval. Cowork validates attached PDFs for manual upload.
capabilities: Match PDFs when attachment bytes are available
defaultPrompt: Reconcile my Qonto invoices for this month

description: Finds missing Qonto receipts. When the mail connector returns PDF files, Claude Code and Codex validate matches and upload them after user approval. Cowork validates attached PDFs for manual upload.
